scripts.build: mkdir -p docs/bundled && redocly bundle b2b/openapi.yaml -o docs/bundled/b2b.yaml && redocly bundle b2c/catalog/openapi.yaml -o docs/bundled/b2c-catalog.yaml && redocly bundle b2c/cart/openapi.yaml -o docs/bundled/b2c-cart.yaml && redocly bundle b2c/orders/openapi.yaml -o docs/bundled/b2c-orders.yaml && redocly bundle moderation/openapi.yaml -o docs/bundled/moderation.yaml
scripts.docs: npm run build && npx serve docs
